theme: What happens 48 hours before a corporate event — behind the scenes

linkedin.text:
48 hours before 120 executives land in Lisbon.

Here's what our team is doing right now:

06:00 — Production manager does first walk of the venue. Every table. Every microphone. Every emergency exit.

08:00 — Kosher catering confirmed with the local chef. Menu tasted, approved. The wine list is shorter than the CEO wanted. (He'll thank us later.)

10:00 — Tech team builds the stage. LED wall test reveals one dead pixel in corner. We catch it. Replaced by noon.

13:00 — First 12 participants land. Airport team is already there with branded welcome signs.

15:00 — Fire drill at the venue. Not because we're required to — because we always do.

18:00 — Dinner reservation reconfirmed. Dietary restrictions cross-checked against the list (4 vegans, 2 gluten-free, 1 nut allergy). No surprises tomorrow.

22:00 — Team briefing. Everyone knows their position, their backup, and the emergency protocol.

By the time your employees land?
All they see is seamless.

That's 16 years of production discipline.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#EventProduction #BehindTheScenes #CorporateEvents #Lisbon #Portugal #UproductionEvents #EventPlanning #MICE
